name: scraper-anti-detection
description: Hardening Bilibili scraper against rate-limit blocks and WAF detection — token bucket rate limiter, proxy rotation, per-instance UA, WAF early-exit, unified task rate config, session validation.

steps.title: Add TokenBucket rate limiter
steps.change: Add TokenBucket class: constructor(burst, sustainPerSec), take() returns Promise that resolves when a token is available. Tokens refill at sustainPerSec rate, never exceed burst cap. Integrate before every fetch() call in bilibiliCrawler.js. Config via BILIBILI_RATE_BURST (default 8) and BILIBILI_RATE_SUSTAIN (default 2). Per-endpoint buckets with different parameters: search stricter (burst=5, sustain=1), video/reply looser (burst=10, sustain=3).
steps.verify: Run 50 rapid card requests. All complete without a single -412 block code. TokenBucket logs show throttling events.

steps.title: Add proxy rotation
steps.change: Add ProxyRotator class: loads proxies from BILIBILI_PROXY_LIST (comma-separated URLs or newline-delimited file). Tracks consecutiveBlocks per proxy. Skips proxies with >=3 consecutive blocks. On applyBlockCooldown(), rotate to next healthy proxy. Health check on init: GET api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/card?mid=1 per proxy. Fallback to direct when pool exhausted. Integrate into fetch() calls via node-fetch agent options.
steps.verify: Set BILIBILI_PROXY_LIST with 3 proxies. Trigger block on proxy #1. Next request uses proxy #2. Log confirms rotation event.

steps.title: Per-instance UA selection (fix global state leak)
steps.change: Move UA selection from module-level sessionUaPicked into BilibiliCrawler constructor. Expand UA pool from 5 to 15: Chrome 123-126 (5 variants), Firefox 124-126 (3 variants), Edge 124-126 (3 variants), Safari 17.x mobile (2 variants), Safari 17.x desktop (2 variants). Each instance picks independently. Add BILIBILI_CRAWLER_UA env override for testing.
steps.verify: Create 3 BilibiliCrawler instances. Assert each has a different userAgent. No module-level mutable state remains.

steps.title: WAF early-exit — stop retrying exhausted endpoints
steps.change: Track WAF count per endpoint + per proxy in a Map. After 3 consecutive WAFs (1015/HTML) on same endpoint, mark exhausted. After 5 total WAFs across all endpoints, abort entire run with clear error. Log each abandonment: endpoint, proxy, attempt count, timestamp.
steps.verify: Mock 3 consecutive 1015 responses on search endpoint. Fourth attempt is skipped with 'endpoint search exhausted after 3 WAFs' log.

steps.title: Unify rate limits across all task configs
steps.change: Remove hardcoded minDelayMs=900/jitterMs=700 from danmaku_deep.json. Make resume_task.js read BILIBILI_CRAWLER_MIN_DELAY_MS and BILIBILI_CRAWLER_JITTER_MS from env (already defined as 2500/2000). Add BILIBILI_DANMAKU_MIN_DELAY_MS env override if danmaku-specific tuning is needed later.
steps.verify: Run danmaku task with default env. Log shows delay >= 2500ms between requests (not 900ms).

steps.title: Login session validation
steps.change: Add validateSession() method: GET api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/nav. If data.isLogin: true → log mid + uname, proceed. If false → log warning, set this.authenticated=false, skip auth-required endpoints (space, favorites, dynamics). Run on init + every 30 min during long runs. Config via BILIBILI_SESSION_CHECK_INTERVAL_MS.
steps.verify: Set expired BILIBILI_COOKIE. Crawler logs 'Session invalid — falling back to unauthenticated mode' and skips auth endpoints without error.
